category_sources: Official README describes Faceprints as a Swift CLI tool that recognizes faces in photos.
source_facts.description says Faceprints detects and labels face images using local Vision.framework models.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is `faceprints`; official README heading uses `Faceprints`.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and documents supported operations.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README documents classifying photos, faceprint indexes, and CLI operations.
source_facts.description mentions detecting and labeling faces with Vision.framework.
